General.Name: Bank of Jiujiang Co Ltd
General.Description: Bank of Jiujiang Co., Ltd. provides various banking products and services for individual customers, corporations, government agencies, and financial institutions in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Corporate Banking, Retail Banking, and Financial Market Business segments. The company offers corporate and personal loans, trade financing, deposit products, granting short-term, medium-term and long-term loans, and other types of corporate and personal intermediary services; and card and personal wealth management services. It also conducts money market or repurchase transactions, and financial investments. In addition, the company provides domestic and overseas settlements, bill acceptance and discounting, government bonds and financial bonds trading, inter-bank placement, letters of credit and guarantee, insurance agency, and safe-box services. Further, the company issues financial bonds; sells securities investment funds and other products; and acts as an agent to issue, settle, and underwrite government bonds, as well as for on inward and outward payments. The company was formerly known as Jiujiang Commercial Bank and changed its name to Bank of Jiujiang Co., Ltd. in September 2008. Bank of Jiujiang Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Chaisang, the People's Republic of China.
General.Address: Bank of Jiujiang Mansion, Chaisang, China, 332000
